one_law: Agents append one entry per app change — obstacles, fixes, golden tips. Read before touching that app again.

entries.summary: FORM_OFFICIAL: stable 5-slot schema (A–D + option 5 free-text); top+bottom Submit; disk-first submit ~31ms; background wire after HTTP response.
obstacles: Hub POST dropped connection — background subprocess before HTTP response (macOS threading)
applied_now=0 when pick already on disk (already_applied skip)
open_questions lacked option_slots until normalize_question_row wired
fixes: hub_form_submit_v1.py: disk_fast_apply + defer background wire until after _json
Slim submit response — no 410KB form payload in POST
golden_tips: Always partial_batch:true for founder batch submit
channel must be hub_browser for INCIDENT-037 guard
Never chain canvas_form_submit synchronously on founder path

entries.summary: Mac Health v4 founder_glance: fixed OFFLINE UI — null guard on removed DOM ids (sources-grid, history-chart).
obstacles: API LIVE on :13024 but UI showed OFFLINE — JS throw on grid.innerHTML
v4 HTML removed legacy panels; app.js still called renderSources/renderHistory without null checks
build-mac-health-standalone blocked on founder session heavy gate
fixes: Synced app.js to Desktop Mac Health Guard.app bundle
Report API score 91 — server was healthy entire time
golden_tips: When upgrading to founder_glance: grep app.js for getElementById — guard every removed id
Proof = curl :13024/health + POST report — not UI badge alone
Console WorkerHubShell crashes are separate from Mac Health server

entries.summary: Worker Hub: hub cache fix, Cloud Proceed under Auto-heal, Railway deploy fix, API Station + founder ops.
obstacles: Hub Load failed ~37s — worker_hub_v1 recursive validator marathon
Proceed missing import invalidate_worker_hub_cache
Railway Docker build failed — brain-os excluded from .dockerignore
WorkerHubShell 7× crash Jun 21 — instant SIGTRAP on launch
fixes: worker_hub_v1.py: disk receipts only, 15s cache TTL
Rebuilt Worker Hub.app with SinaStandaloneShell.prepareApp single-instance
golden_tips: kickstart hub after server code change: launchctl kickstart -k gui/$UID/com.sourcea.hub
Cloud proceed = Hub POST only — never portfolio_competitor_forge on Mac

entries.summary: Cloud Workers command center — situation · organized plans · cloud inbox · event log · CLI catalog · skip head · motor vs pipe classification.
obstacles: Proceed FAIL shown without explaining pipe LIVE vs motor FAIL
No single place for plans/inbox/events/CLI for founder self-serve
golden_tips: MOTOR FAIL on mock_only row = skip head or fix Railway FORGE deps — not Hub pipe

entries.summary: Mac Health full relief — pipeline zombies · CPU cool · RAM inactive purge when hot · visible quick actions · references panel · Hub Pro checklists wired
obstacles: Relieve pressure only cleared ghosts not full stack; RAM/pipeline hidden; sources-grid missing from founder glance HTML
fixes: run_full_relief in mac_health_guard.py; hero Clear pipeline + Reset RAM; sources in More; hub-pro-hub-hero skill + UP-0..UP-7 in Hub Pro tab
golden_tips: Relieve pressure = full_relief not legacy heal only; RAM purge needs Mac password at 75%+; sync mac-health-standalone to .app bundle after edits

entries.summary: Worker Hub crash fix + standalone Cloud Workers command center at /cloud-workers/
obstacles: Worker Hub.app SIGTRAP on launch — prepareApp used NSApp before NSApplication.shared
fixes: SinaStandaloneShell.prepareApp init order + duplicate instance guard; rebuilt Worker Hub.app v11; /cloud-workers/ standalone panel
golden_tips: Crash at prepareApp = NSApplication.shared must run first; cloud panel: http://127.0.0.1:13020/cloud-workers/

entries.summary: AG Routing Panel v1.0 standalone :8782 — agent light/full, compact UI, mermaid diagrams, cost intelligence
obstacles: legacy:8780 heavy WebGL empty space
app.js/css path swap bug
orient_roles dict slice KeyError

entries.summary: v1.1 agent glance + official tabs wired all apps · AG Routing 2nd tab
obstacles: stale n8n/chat local official-links copies

entries.summary: Cloud Workers backlog repair: replaced stale 30 Worker queue with batch 71 Cloud Forge Run head CLOUD-SEC-6967.
obstacles: stale 30-item Worker queue
disk_live_wire_sync hang
Cloud Workers server not running
fixes: generated 100-row Cloud Forge Run batch with 100 tasks per row

entries.summary: Cloud Workers deploy lesson: Railway healthcheck can pass while queue stays on old batch because volume pointer overrides image pointer.
obstacles: healthcheck false confidence
Railway volume pointer stale after batch 71 deploy
old batch 70 still served after successful image build
fixes: proved Railway and local Cloud Workers both report CLOUD-SEC-6967 batch 71
golden_tips: After Railway deploy, proof is /api/cloud-forge-run/queue/v1 head and batch_id, not /health.
If health passes but queue stays on old batch, call sync_pointer_from_image once; do not redeploy repeatedly.
Railway volume pointer can override baked image pointer: /app/receipts/cloud-forge-run/queue-active-pointer-v1.json.

entries.summary: Added Supabase plan registry card with count, lane-limited rows, exact lookup, and no-secret read route.
fixes: Bound Hub UI to /api/sourcea/plan-registry/v1; added Chat Unify read-only plan registry machine; deployed Cloudflare proxy.

entries.summary: v1.4 desktop app: CF 24/7 motor probes in health+panel; Noetfield-Systems/SourceA path in Swift shell
obstacles: cold-start in build script needs double-click or serve script
